Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73150
Patient: MOHAMMED EID KHALIL (MRN: 22217)
Visit Date: 2026-01-13 00:00:00
Diagnosis: V89-Motor- or nonmotor-vehicle accident, type of vehicle unspecified,S82.5-Fracture of medial malleolus,S32.4-Fracture of acetabulum

PACKAGE INCLUSION (1 line(s)):
  These services exceed the scope of the package and were provided as additional
  necessary care beyond the standard package components.
  Request: Approve as supplementary charges outside package scope.
  - Seq 11: MOHAPD2642 - ICU SERVICES ADULT/PEDIATRIC. EXCLUSION AS AGREED (SAR 4746.87)

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (7 line(s), total difference: 0.07 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 10: MOHS-BD400 Claimed=2056.65 Approved=2056.64 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 8: MOHS-AD123 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 7: MOHS-AD125 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 6: MOHS-AD128 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 5: MOHS-AD126 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 4: MOHS-AD129 Claimed=1756.45 Approved=1756.44 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 2: MOHS-AD124 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01

ROOM & BOARD INCLUSION (1 line(s)):
  The services below are distinct from room and board charges and should
  be billed separately per the agreed contract terms.
  Request: Unbundle and approve as separate line items.
  - Seq 1: MOHS-B2060 - APPLICATION OF SPLINTS, SLABS, POP WITHOUT REDUCTION (SAR 1508.21)

---
